scenarios.description: Invoking tagSet twice replaces the parser.settings and updates treeBuilder.parser reference each time
scenarios.precondition: Parser obtained via reflection access to private tagSet, and two distinct ParseSettings instances
scenarios.expectedResult: After each invocation, parser.settings() returns the newly passed instance, and parser is returned both times
pseudocode: TEST TC03 tagSet chaining replaces settings

scenarios.description: Calling public settings(ParseSettings) delegates to tagSet and returns this parser instance
scenarios.precondition: Parser created via htmlParser(), public settings() setter used
scenarios.expectedResult: settings(ParseSettings) returns same parser and parser.settings() equals provided settings
pseudocode: TEST TC04 public settings delegates to tagSet

scenarios.description: Reflection invocation of tagSet with unsupported subclass of ParseSettings (immutable) still assigns provided instance
scenarios.precondition: Parser via htmlParser(); a subclass of ParseSettings overrides nothing (acts same)
scenarios.expectedResult: tagSet accepts subclass, sets parser.settings to it and returns same parser
pseudocode: TEST TC05 tagSet accepts subclass of ParseSettings
class MySettings extends ParseSettings { MySettings() { super(true,false); } }
